name: annihilape
flavor_texts: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.
text: Annihilape is the Rage Monkey Pokémon. It is a fighting and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: vital-spirit, inner-focus, defiant (hidden). Base stats — HP: 110, Attack: 115, Defense: 80, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 90, Speed: 90. Evolution line: mankey → primeape → annihilape. Lore: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body. It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.
